positive: A minimalist, symmetrical design featuring a stylized celestial animal—a fusion of a majestic griffin and a crescent moon—intertwined with abstract constellations and delicate cosmic dust. The creature should be rendered in a clean, thick-lined black silhouette against a solid, contrasting deep midnight blue background. Incorporate vibrant, glowing cyan and gold foil accents for the stars and nebula effects. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for textile printing. Style: Modern esoteric glyph art, inspired by Art Deco and sacred geometry. Lighting: Flat, high contrast, no gradient needed. Details: Intricate linework, perfect symmetry, perfect print resolution, vectorized look.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low contrast, photorealism, messy, busy, gradients (except stars), noise
